messages.content:
{{addHours(1.start; 1)}}{{addHours(1.start; 1)}}Extract appointment information from the user request.

Return ONLY valid JSON.

IMPORTANT:
Convert date and time into ISO datetime format.

Format:

{
"event_name":"{{1.meeting_title}}",
"startDate":"parseDate(concat({{1.date}}; "T"; {{1.time}}; ":00"); "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss")",
"endDate":addHours(
  parseDate(concat({{1.date}}; "T"; {{1.time}}; ":00"); "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss");
  1
)
"person":"{{1.name}}",
"email":"{{1.email}}"
}

Rules:

* startDate must be ISO format
* endDate must be ISO format
* endDate should be 1 hour after startDate
* No explanation
* No markdown
* Return JSON only

Example:

{
  "event_name": "",
  "startDate": "",
  "endDate": "",
  "person": "",
  "email": ""
}

User Message:
{{1.notes}}

mapper.content:
📅

Meeting Confirmed!

Your appointment has been successfully scheduled.

📌 Meeting {{5.event_name}}
👤 Name {{5.person}}
📧 Email
🗓️ Date {{formatDate(5.startDate; "DD MMM YYYY")}}
⏰ Time {{formatDate(5.startDate; "hh:mm A")}} — {{formatDate(5.endDate; "hh:mm A")}}

A Google Calendar invite has been sent to your email.
If you need to reschedule, please reply to this email.

Sent automatically by your booking system
mapper.subject: Your Meeting is Confirmed: {{6.summary}}

messages.content:
You are an appointment scheduling assistant.

The user's requested meeting slot is unavailable.

Suggest exactly 3 alternative meeting times.

Rules:
- Keep same meeting duration
- Suggest business hours only (9 AM–6 PM)
- Keep response short
- Plain text only
- Do not return JSON

mapper.content:
Hi {{5.person}},

Thank you for your booking request.

Unfortunately, your requested meeting time is already booked.

Here are 3 alternative time suggestions:

{{17.result}}
Please reply to this email with your preferred option.

Best regards,
Team Umang AI
mapper.subject: Requested Time Slot Unavailable
